glosses.zh-Hans: 称呼; 信件开头的问候语
glosses.yue: 稱呼; 信件開頭的問候語
glosses.hi: सम्बोधन; पत्र की शुरुआत का अभिवादन
glosses.ja: 呼称; 書き出しのあいさつ

sentences.target: Ich brauche eine Anrede für den Brief.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈanʁeːdə fyːɐ̯ deːn bʁiːf/

translations.de: Ich brauche eine Anrede für den Brief.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈanʁeːdə fyːɐ̯ deːn bʁiːf/
translations.en: I need a greeting for the letter.
translations.es: Necesito un saludo para la carta.
translations.fr: J’ai besoin d’une salutation pour la lettre.
translations.it: Mi serve un saluto per la lettera.
translations.zh-Hans: 我需要写在信里的问候语。
translations.yue: 我需要信開頭嗰句問候。
translations.pt: Preciso de uma saudação para a carta.
translations.tr: Mektup için bir selam cümlesi lazım.
translations.vi: Tôi cần một lời chào cho bức thư.
translations.nl: Ik heb een aanhef voor de brief nodig.
translations.hu: Szükségem van egy köszönésre a levélhez.
translations.hi: मुझे पत्र के लिए एक अभिवादन चाहिए.
translations.el: Χρειάζομαι έναν χαιρετισμό για το γράμμα.
translations.nb: Jeg trenger en hilsen til brevet.
translations.sv: Jag behöver en hälsning till brevet.
translations.ro: Am nevoie de un salut pentru scrisoare.
translations.da: Jeg har brug for en hilsen til brevet.
translations.ja: 手紙のあいさつが必要です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the sentence.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; selects a direct object and a prepositional phrase.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner agreeing with 'Anrede'.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'brauche'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a purpose/target prepositional phrase.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner for 'Brief' governed by 'für'.
Common noun, masculine accusative singular; object of the preposition 'für'.

sentences.target: Die Anrede passt gut in die E-Mail.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈanʁeːdə past ɡuːt ɪn diː ˈiːmeːl/

translations.de: Die Anrede passt gut in die E-Mail.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈanʁeːdə past ɡuːt ɪn diː ˈiːmeːl/
translations.en: The greeting fits well in the email.
translations.es: El saludo queda bien en el correo.
translations.fr: La salutation va bien dans le mail.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个问候在邮件里很合适。
translations.yue: 呢句問候擺喺電郵入面好啱。
translations.ru: Это приветствие хорошо подходит для электронной почты.
translations.pt: A saudação fica bem no e-mail.
translations.nl: De aanhef past goed in de e-mail.
translations.uk: Привітання добре підходить для електронного листа.
translations.hu: A köszönés jól illik az e-mailhez.
translations.hi: अभिवादन ईमेल में अच्छा लगता है.
translations.el: Ο χαιρετισμός ταιριάζει καλά στο email.
translations.ro: Salutul se potrivește bine în e-mail.
translations.cs: Pozdrav se dobře hodí do e-mailu.
translations.ja: そのあいさつはメールに合っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determiner of the subject 'Anrede'.
Common noun, feminine nominative singular; subject of 'passt'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; agrees with 'Anrede'.
Adverb of manner modifying 'passt'.
Preposition; in this usage with 'passen' it governs the accusative, introducing the prepositional complement.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner for 'E-Mail' after 'in'.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; object of the preposition 'in'.

sentences.target: Wir üben die Anrede im Deutschkurs.

translations.de: Wir üben die Anrede im Deutschkurs.
translations.en: We practice greetings in German class.
translations.es: Practicamos el saludo en la clase de alemán.
translations.fr: On pratique les salutations en cours d'allemand.
translations.it: Facciamo pratica dei saluti al corso di tedesco.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在德语课上练习问候语。
translations.yue: 我哋喺德文堂度練習問候語。
translations.ru: Мы тренируем приветствия на уроке немецкого.
translations.pt: Praticamos saudações na aula de alemão.
translations.tr: Almanca dersinde selam cümleleri pratik yapıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi luyện lời chào trong lớp tiếng Đức.
translations.ar: نحن نتدرّب على التحية في درس الألمانية.
translations.nl: We oefenen begroetingen in de Duitse les.
translations.uk: Ми тренуємо привітання на уроці німецької.
translations.hi: हम जर्मन कक्षा में अभिवादन का अभ्यास करते हैं.
translations.el: Εξασκούμαστε στους χαιρετισμούς στο μάθημα γερμανικών.
translations.nb: Vi øver på hilsener i tysktimen.
translations.id: Kami berlatih salam di kelas bahasa Jerman.
translations.ro: Exersăm saluturile la ora de germană.
translations.ja: ドイツ語の授業であいさつを練習します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the sentence.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person plural; takes a direct object and a locative PP.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner for 'Anrede'.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'üben'.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing the dative here, forming a locative PP with a definite article.
Common noun, masculine dative singular as object of 'im'; compound noun (Deutsch ‘German’ as language NOUN + Kurs ‘course’).

translations.fr: Son salut a l'air très amical.
translations.it: Il suo saluto sembra molto cordiale.
translations.zh-Hans: 他的问候听起来很友好。
translations.pt: A saudação dele soa muito amigável.
translations.vi: Lời chào của anh ấy nghe rất thân thiện.
translations.hi: उसका अभिवादन बहुत दोस्ताना लगता है.
translations.el: Ο χαιρετισμός του ακούγεται πολύ φιλικός.
translations.nb: Hilsenen hans høres veldig vennlig ut.
translations.ja: 彼のあいさつはとても友好的に聞こえます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, feminine nominative singular; agrees with 'Anrede'.
Common noun, feminine nominative singular; subject of 'klingt'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; takes a predicative complement.
Degree adverb intensifying the adjective 'freundlich'.
Predicative adjective functioning as complement to 'klingt'.

es: Necesito un saludo para la carta.
El saludo queda bien en el correo.
Practicamos el saludo en la clase de alemán.
fr: J’ai besoin d’une salutation pour la lettre.
La salutation va bien dans le mail.
On pratique les salutations en cours d'allemand.
Son salut a l'air très amical.
it: Mi serve un saluto per la lettera.
Facciamo pratica dei saluti al corso di tedesco.
Il suo saluto sembra molto cordiale.
zh-Hans: 我需要写在信里的问候语。
这个问候在邮件里很合适。
我们在德语课上练习问候语。
他的问候听起来很友好。

呢句問候擺喺電郵入面好啱。

Мы тренируем приветствия на уроке немецкого.

A saudação fica bem no e-mail.
Praticamos saudações na aula de alemão.
A saudação dele soa muito amigável.

Lời chào của anh ấy nghe rất thân thiện.

De aanhef past goed in de e-mail.
We oefenen begroetingen in de Duitse les.

Ми тренуємо привітання на уроці німецької.
hu: Szükségem van egy köszönésre a levélhez.
A köszönés jól illik az e-mailhez.

अभिवादन ईमेल में अच्छा लगता है.
हम जर्मन कक्षा में अभिवादन का अभ्यास करते हैं.
उसका अभिवादन बहुत दोस्ताना लगता है.

Vi øver på hilsener i tysktimen.
Hilsenen hans høres veldig vennlig ut.

Salutul se potrivește bine în e-mail.
